context.role: Background layer providing depth and atmosphere
context.screen_position: Full screen 600x150px, clouds spawn at x=screen_width, y=10-40px random
context.usage_scenario: Static sky color with optional scrolling clouds for parallax depth effect

visual_specification.shape: Solid color sky with optional simple cloud shapes
visual_specification.texture: flat color for sky, pixel art clouds (optional)

animation.description: Clouds scroll left at Current_Speed * 0.5 (parallax effect), loop when x < -100px

visual_specification.details: Sky is solid #F7F7F7, optional clouds: small 46x14px or large 92x27px, spawn every 5-10 seconds at 30% probability, max 3 clouds on screen

relationships.shared_with: Clouds share same color (#535353) as all game objects
relationships.differences_from: ground scrolls at 1.0x speed, background clouds at 0.5x speed (parallax)

explicit_negations: No stars or other celestial objects
No complex cloud shapes or details
